sentence: Chiquin Paurm horas and the room already knew before you walked in.

wombos.definition: To effortlessly show off while making everything look completely natural and easy — to farm aura (accumulate social clout and presence) with quintessential chill. 'Aura farming' means gaining social prestige through cool behavior.
So incredibly impressive that it borders on an unreasonable, almost horrifying level of greatness — the extreme ceiling of being gas.
wombos.example: She's not just moras — she's straight-up horas at this game.
